title: Replace contact form with Tally.so form embed

requirements.summary: Remove the existing ContactInquiryForm component from the Contact Us page
acceptanceCriteria: The ContactInquiryForm component is no longer rendered on the Contact Us page
The form section is replaced with the Tally form embed area

file_operations.description: Remove the ContactInquiryForm component import and usage. Replace the form section with a placeholder div that will contain the Tally.so embed in REQ-2. Maintain the existing hero section with Mail, Phone, and MapPin contact info cards. Keep the page layout structure and amber/orange gradient theme consistent.

requirements.summary: Integrate Tally.so form embed in the Contact Us page using either the form URL or embed code provided by the user
acceptanceCriteria: The Tally form is displayed in the same area where ContactInquiryForm was previously located
The Tally form maintains the existing page layout and styling consistency
The form is responsive and works on both desktop and mobile views

file_operations.description: Create a new React component that embeds a Tally.so form using either an iframe with the form URL or by injecting the Tally embed script. The component should accept the Tally form URL or embed code as a prop. Ensure the iframe is responsive with appropriate width and height styling that matches the previous form dimensions. Include loading states and error boundaries for robustness.

Import and render the TallyFormEmbed component in the form section area where ContactInquiryForm was previously located. Pass the Tally form URL or embed code as a prop (the actual URL/code will be provided by the user during implementation). Ensure the embedded form maintains the same spacing, container width (max-w-2xl), and positioning as the previous form. Keep the scroll reference functionality intact if needed.
